revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Country data Puerto Rico]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

#redirect[[:en:Template:Country_data_Puerto_Rico]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country_data_Puerto_Rico]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Puerto Rico | flag alias = Flag of Puerto Rico.svg | flag alias-1868 = Flag of Lares (1868).svg | flag alias-1895 = Flag of Puerto Rico (1895–1952).png | flag alias-1898 = Flag of the United States (1896-1908).svg | flag alias-1908 = Flag of the United States (1908-1912).svg | flag alias-1912 = Flag of the United States (1912-1959).svg | flag alias-1952 = Flag of Puerto Rico (1952-1995).svg | flag alias-1995 = Flag of Puerto Rico (WFB 2013).gif | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1868 | var2 = 1895 | var3 = 1898 | var4 = 1908 | var5 = 1912 | var6 = 1952 | var7 = 1995 | redir1 = PRI | redir2 = PUR </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Puerto_Rico here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
